message:
feat(core): add compact_bitset module for fixed-size bitwise set operations

Dense bitset backed by Vec<u64> with efficient word-level bitwise ops.
Supports set operations (union, intersection, difference, symmetric
difference), complement, subset/superset checks, bit iteration, serde,
and operator overloads. 51 inline tests + 40 property-based tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
